overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features three navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data, with periodic lightning illuminating the rough ocean waters ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

events.description: Lightning strike illuminates the ocean on the port side
Second lightning flash visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: Navigating the vessel through stormy seas using the electronic chart and radar systems

entered.detail: Electronic chart display showing coastal map with vessel position and coastline
Radar display with rotating sweep showing surrounding waters and targets
Blue sonar or depth sounder display screen
Forward deck of the vessel with metal railings and anchor equipment visible through the window
Rough stormy seas with visible wave action and whitecaps
Metal window frame structure surrounding the forward view from the bridge

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge during a nighttime storm, showing three navigation monitors and the bow deck ahead. Lightning periodically flashes on the left side, illuminating the rough seas as the vessel maintains steady forward navigation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

events.description: Lightning bolt strikes the water on the port side
Intense lightning flash brightly illuminates the forward view and bridge interior

agents.ego_description: Continuing to navigate the vessel forward through the storm while monitoring radar and chart displays

segments.scene_description: Continued navigation through the storm with the bridge instruments visible. A lightning strike hits the water on the port side, followed by an exceptionally bright flash that temporarily illuminates the entire forward view.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

events.description: Lightning strike visible on the left side of the vessel

agents.ego_description: Maintaining course through rough seas while monitoring the navigation displays for obstacles

segments.scene_description: Final segment of the storm navigation showing consistent forward motion through rough waters. Another lightning flash appears on the port side, briefly lighting up the dark ocean as the vessel continues its voyage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy ocean punctuated by rhythmic flashes of lightning. It begins with a view of three navigation monitors and the bow deck, where periodic lightning on the left side briefly reveals the turbulence of the rough seas. As the vessel maintains its steady forward course, a sudden lightning strike hits the water on the port side, triggering an exceptionally bright flash that momentarily illuminates the entire forward horizon. The scene then settles back into the darkness of the storm, continuing its forward motion through the churning waves before a final flash of light on the port side briefly exposes the vast, dark ocean once more.
